title: Autopilot Loop Status
goal: Implement #468 so summary exposes a compact autopilot-loop status for satisfied, continued, blocked, or routed intent.
non_goals: Do not add a new top-level command unless summary cannot carry the answer.
Do not automate git, GitHub, or implementation execution inside the package.

intent.outcome: A long lane has one cheap machine-readable loop status that says whether intent is satisfied, continued, blocked, or routed.
intent.constraints: Keep the status agent-, repo-, tracker-, and tool-agnostic.
intent.latitude: Choose compact field names and derive status from existing planning contracts.
intent.escalation: Escalate if this requires host-specific issue tracker behavior.

execution.next_step: Promote #462 as the next planned payload-boundary slice.
execution.proof: focused planning summary tests plus package validation

invariants: Do not add host-specific tracker semantics to core planning.
Do not expand first-contact output beyond a compact status and routing answer.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #442: make the plan -> implement -> evaluate continuation loop first-class for long lanes.
intent_continuity.continuation surface: none for this parent lane; next active work moves to #462

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #445-#448 plus #468 now satisfy the parent #442 loop-intent lane.

parent_lane.title: Add an autopilot intent loop for plan, implement, evaluate, and continue

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Compact planning summary now exposes autopilot_loop.status as one of satisfied, continued, blocked, or routed; active hierarchy also recovers execplan parent_lane objects.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: No remaining #442 child slice is required.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Parent-lane projection was relying on older intent_continuity prose; structured parent_lane objects now recover in hierarchy and handoff projections.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: focused planning tests and ruff passed; full package validation is listed in validation_commands.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: run the full validation_commands before commit

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Expose autopilot loop status for satisfied, continued, blocked, and routed intent.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not add a new command or host-specific issue behavior unless existing summary cannot carry the answer.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The implementation would need scheduler behavior or tracker-specific closure automation.

context_budget.live working set: state, this execplan, #468 issue, summary construction, hierarchy contract, closeout contract, and package tests
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Next active issue is #468 autopilot loop status.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before adding a new command or host-specific issue behavior.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make plan -> implement -> evaluate continuation first-class without relying on chat memory.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Answer loop status through existing summary rather than creating a new surface.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: After this slice, can #442 close honestly?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Inspect compact summary projections for existing status sources.
Derive one autopilot_loop status without adding a new command.
Add tests for incomplete larger intent that requires another slice.
invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/archive/autopilot-loop-status.plan.json .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/planning-payload-surface-classification.plan.json --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Summary exposes one machine-readable autopilot-loop status.
Status can be one of satisfied, continued, blocked, or routed.
Tests cover an incomplete larger intent that requires another slice.
#442 can be honestly closed or remains explicitly routed after this slice.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Summary exposes a compact autopilot_loop status; active planning records return continued, blocked surfaces return blocked, promotion pressure returns routed, and quiet state returns satisfied. The active hierarchy also recovers structured execplan parent_lane data.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: #442 can close honestly; future lanes can inspect summary.autopilot_loop instead of reconstructing continuation state from archived child plans.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #445-#448 landed the refresh, audit, authority, and priority pieces; #468 adds the missing machine-readable loop status and parent-lane projection needed to evaluate continuation without chat.
closure_check.reopen trigger: summary still lacks satisfied/continued/blocked/routed autopilot status

drift_log: 2026-04-27: Dogfooding found structured parent_lane was not projected; fixed inside this slice.
